sglang.title: [FP8 KV Cache, Mixtral] Avoid KeyError at loading pre-quantized FP8 m…
sglang.author: HaiShaw
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
…odel with kv_scale

Motivation
Reuse FP8 quantized Mixtral models, to avoid KeyError, just skip/ignore kv_scale for now.
E.g. amd/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v0.1-FP8-KV has kv_scale embedded, run following command to ignore them for now.
python -m sglang.bench_latency --model amd/Mixtral-8x7B-Instruct-v

vllm.title: [Misc] Add metrics for request queue time, forward time, and execute time
vllm.author: Abatom
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add metrics for request queue time, forward time, and execute time, which can be returned through the /metrics API.
Remove the restriction on collect_model_forward_time and collect_model_execute_time due to the --otlp-traces-endpoint flag, so that metrics can also collect information about model_for

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Use host argument to bind to interface
vllm.author: svenseeberg
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
From what I can gather from the documentation, the --host argument is supposed to bind the process to the interface with the IP address provided as the value.
This passes the IP address to the sock.bind() call. To be compatible to the existing behavior, I set the default value for args.host to 0.0.0

vllm.title: [Misc]: Typo fix: Renaming classes (casualLM -> causalLM)
vllm.author: yannicks1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Renaming classes to fix typo: casualLM -> causalLM
FIX #9799
OpenVINOCasualLM -> OpenVINOCausalLM
NeuronCasualLM -> NeuronCausalLM

vllm.title: [Model]  Add LlamaEmbeddingModel as an embedding Implementation of LlamaModel
vllm.author: jsato8094
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds LlamaEmbeddingModel as an embedding implementation of LlamaModel in the model registry. LlamaEmbeddingModel has already been introduced as the implementation for MistralModel, and this addition leverages the existing implementation.
Background:
At my company, we are developing an embedd

vllm.title: [CI][Bugfix] Skip chameleon for transformers 4.46.1
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Chameleon test only specifically checked for 4.46.0, however the newly released 4.46.1 did not address this model
Failing CI https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci-aws/builds/10430#0192d917-3982-44f7-8c97-0a3e2472c7b1/159-4366

vllm.title: [CI/Build] mergify: fix rules for ci/build label
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This label would only be applied if a PR matched ALL patterns instead
of at least one of this. This fixes it so the label is applied if any
of the patterns match.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [MISC] Set label value to timestamp over 0, to keep track of recent history
vllm.author: coolkp
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Set label value to timestamp over 0 which is not consumed at all, to keep track of recent history of waiting adapters and active adapters, so metrics polling doesn't have to be aggressive.
We plan to leverage this information for routing decisions in https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/llm-instance-g

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Frontend] Guard against bad token ids
vllm.author: joerunde
vllm.bodyExcerpt: I discovered that you can take down any vllm server running a non-mistral model by passing in prompt: [999999], because the tokenizer will happily detokenize to an empty string without erroring. This causes the bad token id to make it into the model, where a forward pass will cause a cuda error like

vllm.title: [Model] tool calling support for ibm-granite/granite-20b-functioncalling
vllm.author: wseaton
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add tool calling parser support for ibm-granite/granite-20b-functioncalling.
Also adds an example chat template that is based off of the granite fc paper.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix prefix strings for quantized VLMs
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The prefix strings were not being constructed correctly for many VLMs, particularly due to the use of sub-models. This was causing quant_config to be enabled for modules that are ignored within the quantization_config of the model, causing failures during weight loading.
It's important to note that

vllm.bodyExcerpt: Needed to work with quantized vision encoders from VLMs. A generalization of the proposed fix in #9800 to all of the cases in apply_fp8_linear

vllm.title: [ci/build] Pin CI dependencies version with pip-compile
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Due to recent CI failures related to new releases from CI dependencies, we should freeze all direct & underlying dependencies and update them periodically (once a week)
This PR moves all dependencies to requirements-test.in and generate requirements-test.txt using pip-compile with python 3.12 (same

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix multi nodes TP+PP for XPU
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR fixes TP+PP execution for XPU on multi-nodes. We switch to use all_gather_into_tensor instead which also can give better perf. Ray initialization also fails to connect existing ray cluster in XPU case.

vllm.title: [Doc] Add the DCO to CONTRIBUTING.md
vllm.author: russellb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PRs to vLLM now require a Signed-off-by header as an acknowledgement
of the DCO. Add the DCO to the repo and update CONTRIBUTING.md with a
pointer to it.
While in there, add a LICENSE link to the contributing doc as well.
Signed-off-by: Russell Bryant rbryant@redhat.com

vllm.title: [torch.compile] rework compile control with piecewise cudagraph

rework the compilation control.
the user-facing flags are:



Usage

how vLLM uses Dynamo
how vLLM uses Inductor
use vLLM's custom ops (*)
how to customize the compilation




export VLLM_TORCH_COMPILE_LEVEL=0 (default)
NO_COMPILATION (0)
N/A
N/A
✅
N/A


export VLLM_TORCH_COMPILE_LEV
